meta.main_description: Live flight board for {airport} ({iata}) in {city}, {country}. Real-time arrivals, departures, gate information and delay status updated every minute.
meta.arrivals_description: Live arrival board for {airport} ({iata}) in {city}. Real-time flight status, baggage carousel numbers and terminal information updated every minute.
meta.departures_description: Live departure board for {airport} ({iata}) in {city}. Real-time flight status, gate numbers, terminal and delay information updated every minute.

home.headline: Live flight boards for 6,000+ airports
home.subline: Real-time arrivals and departures worldwide. Updated every minute.
